# DeepSeek OpenAI Chat Fixture

Offline evidence captured from official DeepSeek documentation on 2026-07-22.
The corpus fixes the OpenAI-format `/chat/completions` facade, exact V4 Pro
model, one buffered tool-bearing attempt, two SSE final attempts, continuation
replay, cache usage, error classes, cancellation limits, and drift rejection.

No credential, account, balance request, provider call, retry, or cache entry
is used. Values are deterministic synthetic examples shaped from the promoted
official evidence in Research 023.
